title: Garlicky Chickpea Souffle
description: A French-inspired, garlicky soufflé made with chickpea flour, perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
In a separate bowl, whisk together the chickpea flour, garlic, and vegetable broth.
Add the melted butter and beaten eggs to the bowl and whisk until smooth.
Pour the mixture into the pastry-lined dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the soufflé is puffed and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
